name: adaire-blocks
description: Adaire Blocks is a powerful WordPress plugin that empowers developers and designers to craft visually stunning, high-performance websites with ease. Seamlessly integrating GSAP animations and advanced layout controls, it lets you bring your creative vision to life with smooth, professional-grade motion effects — all within the familiar Gutenberg editor.
author: Adaire Digital

scripts.build:local: npm run build && npm run sync:local
scripts.deploy:free: npm run build:free && npm run plugin-zip
